textByHashes.d23d33d5717b8e8a182b092dc33e4548f1740c90: Clear off you evil body snatcher! You won't get any of my wares.
textByHashes.05fb86bc90357a6464405cfe7a092577619b9268: Oh, it's you. I hear you're helping us now. To be honest, I'm still not thrilled to have you around, but so be it.
textByHashes.94d1126dbb137d532e5395dcd4f459b9744ff26b: That's right. I need three things, but the quarantine is making some of them hard to obtain.
textByHashes.22b9a637aaee0f77a73626aa1bee608006f1d46e: First, I need some salt. Normally I get mine from the salt lake just north of the city. Just fill a bucket from the lake and then use the suntrap outside to separate the salt from the water.
textByHashes.efcd134897109651733bad855c2fd62dabcdeba6: Next, I need some tree sap. You can use a knife to extract some from a tree, but make sure you have a bucket ready. Most coniferous evergreen trees should have some. They're the cone-shaped ones.
textByHashes.ff7621db07ba76d5272f8e79087009cc872a96f2: Finally, I need some linen. That one shouldn't be too hard. The local cloth salesman should have some.
textByHashes.ba39ecba503dd077702c4e44e6b7093e5dcd5e8c: Well that was unexpected. Thank you.
textByHashes.ffc10cbd012a4003d2fbb92236adde8ec7f20480: Oh, it's you. Any luck obtaining those items?
textByHashes.e262b4b4b401e7fb3c25190bb87bd8460cadb3f9: Thank you. I think that's everything I need.
textByHashes.04b949d28b00db03a6b03b03533654f69531706d: Well you'd better get a move on.
textByHashes.b94e155c999567472a4d3d9b5d774ea1a4e2dfe1: You can use a knife to extract some from a tree, but make sure you have a bucket ready. Most coniferous evergreen trees should have some. They're the cone- shaped ones.
textByHashes.27e1cae7f771720cf3d65f16914f73379a988d8b: Normally I get mine from the salt lake just north of the city. Just fill a bucket from the lake and then use the suntrap outside to separate the salt from the water.
textByHashes.bb839f70155a1db0ba5642c81160ae227ac18217: The local cloth salesman should have some for sale.
textByHashes.77c4779ccb1a022fb82ba96e0404cbee5f6bdfd4: Oh, it's you. You've already gathered everything I need. I'm sure you have plenty of other things to be doing.
textByHashes.bc4a74bd42b0cb119073a20a61167500c1a48925: Well I have lots to do, so good day.
textByHashes.cb89d7db74a89a24953fe6d79f3607e2e0c24ada: Hello again. Do you need something?
textByHashes.792ed1f469d27126fbf81cc4335e60f0695ce71a: Well I'm afraid I can't stop to talk right now. Lots to do.
textByHashes.d249e6b490a8db9b5c7a18cdd4b30df9c301fdaf: If I thought that these spots could be cured by some potion, I would have mixed up one for myself before now.
